text: HELM (Holistic Evaluation of Language Models, Liang et al. 2023, Stanford CRFM) provides a standardized framework for evaluating LLMs across 42 scenarios covering 7 metric categories.

BIG-bench (Srivastava et al. 2023, 450+ authors, Google) is a collaborative benchmark with 204 tasks testing LLM capabilities beyond standard NLP, including reasoning, creativity, and social intelligence.
MMLU (Hendrycks et al. 2021, UC Berkeley) measures massive multitask language understanding across 57 subjects from STEM to humanities, becoming the standard benchmark for LLM knowledge evaluation.
